DP.099.0003:
Hey, there!
How’s it going, Trainer?\f
You being here tells me you’re going
to challenge the Gym Leader.\f
Well... I hate to break it to
you, but that’s impossible.\f
You’re questioning why, and the
answer is: she’s not here.\f
Come back another time, OK?
I’ll be right here waiting.
DP.099.0004:
So, where’s the Gym Leader, you ask.\f
I can’t precisely say, but I have a
hunch that she’ll return one day...\f
But only after you visit other
places, I think.\f
Hey, I’m sorry I’m not useful to you.
My advice giving needs work...
DP.099.0005:
Hey, there!
How’s it going, Champ-to-be?\f
The Gym Leader here is a user of
Ghost-type Pokémon.\f
Beware, Normal-type moves have no
effect at all on ghosts!\f
It’s as if they weren’t there!
But you’ll have to see for yourself.\f
Go get ’em, challenger!
I believe in you!
DP.099.0006:
Oh! [0103,0000]!
You’ve beaten the Gym Leader!\f
There seems to be no end to how
tough you are getting!\f
At least that’s how I see it!\f
...You do realize I say that to
everyone, right?

Leader: Fantina\f
